description: Set's the Slot Order Offset field of the provided Instance slot upon calling * (Call).

fields.* ([[Impulses|Call]]): Call this to set the Instance (Slot)'s order offset to OrderOffset (long).
fields.Instance: Slot to set the property for.
fields.OrderOffset: The value to set Instance (Slot)'s Order Offset to when * (Call) is called.
fields.Next: Sends an impulse when Instance (Slot)'s Order Offset is set to OrderOffset (long) when * (Call) is called.
